name: @stackra/storage
purpose: Unified KV storage — one IStorage contract with pluggable drivers (memory, null, localStorage, sessionStorage, IndexedDB via Dexie, AsyncStorage).
capabilities: Single IStorage contract for every substrate
Drivers: memory, null, localStorage, sessionStorage, IndexedDB, AsyncStorage, cookie
get / set / remove / clear / has / keys / size / subscribe
when_to_use: Any package needs persistent or ephemeral KV storage without touching the browser API directly.
when_not_to_use: For cache-aside patterns prefer @stackra/cache on top; for job persistence use @stackra/queue.
